met.location: consumer unit cupboard, ground floor hallway

assumptions: Ze of 0.35Ω is DNO-declared; design margin allows up to Ze≈0.45Ω before C04 fails Zs.
Twin-and-earth 6242Y assumed throughout (manufacturer-stated reduced CPC csa).
Bathroom layout matches default zone classification per BS 7671 Section 701.

flags: TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — Zs values are LLM-estimates; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3.

rationale.chat_summary: TN-C-S earthing for a 3-bed UK semi on PME supply (Ze=0.35Ω). MET in hallway cupboard with 10mm² bonds to water and gas and 6mm² to loft structural steel. Six final circuits, all with CPCs sized per BS 7671 Table 54.7 and protected by the 30mA main RCD. Bathroom has supplementary 4mm² bonding. All circuits Zs-compliant with margin. Reply to refine, e.g. 'add solar PV'.

sections.title: Earthing System
sections.summary: TN-C-S confirmed from the DNO PME declaration (Ze=0.35Ω). Within the installation, N and PE are separated downstream of the service head. NEC terminology equivalent: 'grounded system with combined PEN at supply side'.

decisions.label: TN-C-S system confirmed
decisions.summary: DNO declared PME earth with Ze=0.35Ω; no DNO restriction in force.
decisions.rule: Ontology TN-C-S entry permitted for GB

sections.title: Main Earthing Terminal
sections.summary: MET located in consumer unit cupboard, ground floor hallway. Supply bond type 'dno_pme_bond' (PEN bonded at service head). Main earthing conductor 16mm² Cu.

decisions.label: MET location
decisions.summary: Located in CU cupboard for accessibility and short bond runs.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Reg 542.4.1 — MET accessible and labelled

inputs.met_location: consumer unit cupboard, ground floor hallway

decisions.label: Main earthing conductor 16 mm² Cu
decisions.summary: Half of largest service conductor (25mm² → 16mm²), unprotected route ≥10mm², so 16mm² satisfies both rules.

sections.title: Electrodes
sections.summary: No supplementary electrode installed — DNO provides PME earth. Recommendation flagged in case of future EV chargepoint addition (open-PEN mitigation).

sections.title: Main Bonding
sections.summary: Three main protective bonds from MET to all extraneous-conductive-parts: water service entry, gas service entry, and structural steel in loft.

decisions.label: 10mm² Cu to water and gas services
decisions.summary: PME minimum CSA for service bonds; supports max Ief in fault.

decisions.label: 6mm² Cu to structural steel
decisions.summary: Structural steel sized per general 544.1 rule; not a service entry.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Reg 544.1.1 — half of largest PE, min 6mm²

sections.title: Supplementary Bonding
sections.summary: First-floor bathroom retains supplementary bonding even though the 701.415.2 exemption could apply, as belt-and-braces resilience per UK trade custom.

decisions.label: 4mm² supplementary bonding in bathroom
decisions.summary: Bonds bath taps, towel rail, exposed pipework, shower enclosure earth lug.

sections.title: CPC + Zs Verification
sections.summary: All CPCs sized via BS 7671 Table 54.7 (twin-and-earth integral reduced CPCs). Zs verified per circuit against the 0.8-corrected Zs_max from Table 41.3. All circuits pass.

decisions.label: CPCs from Table 54.7
decisions.summary: Domestic twin-and-earth wiring — table method appropriate.

decisions.label: Zs verified against 0.8-corrected Zs_max
decisions.summary: Temperature correction per Appendix 14; all margins positive.

sections.title: RCD Requirements
sections.summary: All final circuits 30mA RCD-protected via the consumer unit main RCD: sockets ≤32A and bathroom circuits per BS 7671 411.3.3, lighting in bathroom path per 411.3.4.

decisions.label: 30mA RCD on every circuit via main RCD
decisions.summary: Single RCD-main consumer unit covers all final circuits.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 411.3.3 — RCD for sockets ≤32A in domestic

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant. One INFO flag emitted recommending future-proofing for EV chargepoints (open-PEN mitigation per BS 7671 722.411.4.1).

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Three assumptions captured: declared Ze (not measured), twin-and-earth cable type throughout, and default bathroom zone classification.
